beats.text: [i]You wake the next morning to a gentle jostle. A lamp glows softly on the nearby table, and the girl beside you looks more startled than you feel.[/i]

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: ...Oh! I'm sorry, I didn't mean to wake you.

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: Did you rest well?

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: ...Where am I?
[i]The young woman shifts nervously, a bundle of used gauze and bandages in her hands. She answers quietly.[/i]

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: You're in Hearthwynn's infirmary.

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: Don't try to sit up too fast, okay?

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: What happened?

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: I found you in the woods, after that blast.

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: You were hurt badly enough that I wasn't going to leave you there.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: The woods...

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: I don't remember.

beats.speaker: Villager Girl
beats.text: That's alright. You don't have to force it right now.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: Who are you?

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Sera.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I'm the village priest. I keep the infirmary as well.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: You seem to be showing signs of amnesia... can you remember your name?
Enter your name:

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: {player_name}.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: {player_name}. Okay.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I won't pry into who you are or where you came from.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I've never seen you before, and people here may be nervous about that.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: But you don't seem like a bad person.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: If you don't have anywhere to go, you can stay in Hearthwynn for now.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: Okay... thanks.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: You can stay at the infirmary for as long as you need. You need rest right now more than anything.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Though, eventually, you might prefer to have an actual room. You can talk to Lyra about that.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: Lyra?

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: She runs the tavern south from here. She's a bit rambunctious and loud, but she's kind.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Tell her I sent you. She'll hear you out.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: As for you... no adventuring for a while. Not until your body catches up with you.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: Rest here tonight. When you're ready, go to the tavern and talk to Lyra.

beats.speaker: Sera
beats.text: I'll come see you once you get a room and are feeling better.
